name: Anise Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut chicken into 1-inch chunks.
2. Heat sesame oil in a pan over medium heat.
3. Fry the chicken pieces until they are no longer transparent, about 5-7 minutes.
4. Remove the chicken from the pan and set aside.
5. Add the remaining sauce ingredients (Worcestershire sauce, anise seeds, Chinese 5 spice powder, and rice) to the pan with the rendered fat.
6. Pour in the chicken broth and bring the mixture to a boil.
7. Reduce heat to low and simmer until all liquid is absorbed and the rice is cooked through, about 20-25 minutes.
8. Return the fried chicken pieces to the pan and stir gently.
9. Serve hot with additional sesame oil on top if desired.
Makes 2 servings.
